reasoning: On 2025-12-21, Wikipedia's Top Players list explicitly features Gukesh at Rank #10. By March 2026, he will have played classical events like Tata Steel. Given his recent slump (13 classical losses in 2025), he is vulnerable to dropping out of the top 10, making a YES less likely for the March date.
